name: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, cook celery and onion in butter until tender.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except noodles and parsley. Bring to boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer covered for 30 minutes.
4. Remove bay leaf; add noodles and parsley.
5. Cook an additional 10 minutes or until noodles are tender, stirring occasionally.
